title: How a Man of God Fights the Scroll
caption:
You don't have a distraction problem. You have a worship problem.

The phone is where lust lives, where envy lives, where your time dies. The scroll is the first thing many men reach for in the morning and the last thing they hold at night. That's not just a habit. That's a throne.

Every generation has had something that fought for first place. Yours just fits in your pocket and knows exactly when you're weakest.

You don't need a digital detox. You need a war plan — and at least one man who's allowed to ask the hard question and expects a straight answer.

"He who sows to his own flesh will from the flesh reap corruption." — Galatians 6:8

Save this for the man trying to win.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #selfcontrol #thefight
